items.title: BNP Names Jain Global’s Gupta as Head of FICC Trading Americas
items.description: BNP Paribas SA has appointed Kavi Gupta — previously at multistrategy hedge fund Jain Global — as head of fixed income, currencies and commodities trading across the Americas.

items.title: SK Hynix US Listing Said to Be Multiple Times Oversubscribed
items.description: SK Hynix Inc.’s $28 billion US listing is multiple times oversubscribed ahead of pricing on Thursday, according to people familiar with the matter.

items.title: Germany Must Stabilize Debt in Long Run to Keep AAA, Scope Says
items.description: Germany’s debt mountain will need to stop growing in the long term if the country is to retain its top credit grade, according to Scope Ratings.

items.title: Abu Dhabi Ruler’s Family Office Is a Global Dealmaking Force
items.description: Its name is rarely spoken in public, but the family office of Abu Dhabi's ruler is a global force with a huge appetite for deals. Ben Stupples explains. (Source: Bloomberg)
